---
title: "Gallery"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---

<style>
main.content {
  max-width: 1200px !important;
}

.gallery {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(320px, 1fr));
  gap: 16px;
  margin-top: 1.5rem;
}

.gallery-item {
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  border-radius: 14px;
  aspect-ratio: 1 / 1;
  background: #f5f5f5;
}

.gallery-item img {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;
  display: block;
  transition: transform 0.35s ease;
}

.gallery-item:hover img {
  transform: scale(1.05);
}
</style>

<div class="gallery">

<div class="gallery-item">
![](photos/gradpic.jpg){.lightbox}
</div>

<div class="gallery-item">
![](photos/trainingimage.jpg){.lightbox}
</div>

</div>
